block_00: Don’t Miss The Opportunity To Try Our Platform For Free
block_03: You haven't tried out your SabioTrade Trial account yet, and time's ticking — it's only valid for one more week. Hurry up to get a feel of our platform in a commitment-free format.
block_08: Not sure if you can nail the assessment challenge? The trial assessment flow is an exact replica of the real one, and a stress-free way to find out if you have what it takes to get funded.
block_10: Take your time to look around and get familiar with the platform's buttons and navigation. This way, you'll feel right at home when your Real account goes live.
block_12: Your Trial account is waiting — get started today!
